_comment: GREENFIELD template ruleset — for NEW repos that adopt the factory ci.yml (jobs: lint/test/build/verification/audit). TWO DISTINCT audit gates exist and must not be conflated: (1) 'audit' — the ci.yml STATIC committed-report gate (finds committed audit-report*.md under specs/** and verification/reviews/**, fails only on a '**VERDICT:** ... Fail' line, lenient/green when no report is present); it is always present in greenfield, so it is required here. (2) 'independent-audit' — the LIVE independent DeepSeek verdict (independent-audit.yml's own job/run conclusion, ADR-0009); it is required ONLY on repos that have landed independent-audit.yml via scripts/enable-audit.sh, added per-repo at activation via scripts/reconcile-ci-checks.sh — it is NEVER a greenfield default (requiring a context that never reports would dead-block every PR), so it is deliberately absent from required_status_checks here. Per-repo variant rulesets (routed via .factory/ruleset-map.tsv) may require NEITHER 'audit' NOR 'independent-audit' because they run neither audit job (OQ3 opt-out). setup-repo.sh selects the ruleset data-driven via the ruleset-map.tsv manifest (repo basename -> variant file); precedence is RULESET= override > .factory/ruleset-map.tsv > this greenfield ruleset.json (the default for any repo not in the manifest). Start enforcement=evaluate, flip to active when green.
name: factory-main-gates
